summary: Implemented executable compliance guardrails: tenant SQL lint, RLS smoke/fuzz, audit hash-chain verifier, WORM Terraform scanner, validation dossier tooling, Codex agent sync, signed normative package verifier.
Created validation dossier requirements, traceability matrix, coverage report and evidence folders. Current honest PRD §13 coverage is 3/22 criteria.
Updated AGENTS.md with commit/push workflow for future agents and pushed main to GitHub.
limitations: P0-2 still needs real KMS signing and an approved baseline normative package.
P0-3 maps only 3/22 PRD §13 acceptance criteria.
Gate 7 still needs certificate snapshot-diff and scheduled flake gate.
Gate 5 covers RLS fuzz; app RBAC depends on real auth/RBAC implementation.
WORM scanner exists, but no production IaC is present yet.
next_steps: Implement P0-6: CODEOWNERS plus product-governance gate for critical/compliance paths.
Implement P0-7: measurable budget hooks and persisted budget logs.
Continue P0-2: approved baseline normative package and KMS signing flow.
Continue P0-3: map remaining PRD §13 criteria into requirements.yaml with linked specs/tests.
Implement P0-9 runbooks for KMS, hash-chain, WORM and normative package recovery.
Start first product slice only after governance gate is in place.
handoff_instruction: On /resume, read AGENTS.md, harness/STATUS.md, compliance/sessions-log/2026-04-20/codex-handoff.jsonl, then run git status -sb and pnpm check:all before changing code.

summary: Implemented P0-6 first functional slice: .github/CODEOWNERS, PR template checklist, tools/governance-gate.ts, governance pre-commit hook, and pnpm governance-gate in check:all.
Governance gate validates required CODEOWNERS owners, required PR template checklist phrases, and that product-governance cannot write application/package/compliance paths outside release-norm.
Fixed Windows worktree CRLF/LF issues in check-agents-drift, sync-agents, and validation-dossier comparators; added LF attributes for Bash hooks so pre-commit runs under Git Bash.
limitations: GitHub branch protection requiring CODEOWNERS approval still needs remote repository configuration; local gate can only validate repository files.
P0-6 remains [~] Em implementação until remote branch protection is confirmed.
P0-7 budgets, P0-9 runbooks, approved normative baseline/KMS, and remaining PRD §13 mapping are still pending.
next_steps: Configure GitHub branch protection for main to require CODEOWNERS review and required checks.
Implement P0-7 measurable budgets with persisted logs and hook enforcement.
Continue P0-2 with approved baseline normative package and real KMS signing flow.
Continue P0-3 by mapping remaining PRD §13 criteria into requirements.yaml with linked specs/tests.
Implement P0-9 runbooks for KMS, hash-chain, WORM and normative package recovery.

verification: Docker Desktop started; docker compose up -d postgres; docker compose ps healthy
summary: Implemented P0-7 first functional slice: tools/budget-tracker.ts reads caps from .claude/settings.json, records JSONL budget events, aggregates consumption, alerts soft caps and blocks hard caps.
Connected Claude and Codex PreToolUse/PostToolUse hooks to budget-tracker, including WSL-to-Windows path conversion for pnpm.cmd execution.
Added pnpm budget:check to check:all as a read-only gate; hooks use --write-events to persist alert/block audit events.
Updated harness/11-budgets.md and harness/STATUS.md to reflect P0-7 implementation status; added .codex/hooks/*.sh LF enforcement in .gitattributes.
limitations: Budget metadata depends on CLI-provided environment variables; when absent, consumption records metadataMissing=true with zero usage while accumulated caps still evaluate.
P0-7 remains [~] because concurrency limits, retry/circuit-breaker loop detection, and weekly budget reporting are not implemented yet.
Docker Desktop was not running initially; test:tenancy failed until the daemon was started and postgres compose service was healthy.
P0-2 approved baseline/KMS, P0-3 remaining PRD §13 mapping, P0-9 runbooks, and remote branch protection remain pending.
next_steps: Implement P0-7 concurrency limits for Tier 1/Tier 2/Tier 3 and retry/circuit-breaker counters.
Implement weekly budget report generation under compliance/budget-log/weekly with ADR/PR discipline if tracked compliance files change.
Continue P0-2 with approved baseline normative package and real KMS signing flow.
Continue P0-3 by mapping remaining PRD §13 criteria into requirements.yaml with linked specs/tests.
Implement P0-9 runbooks for KMS, hash-chain, WORM and normative package recovery.

verification: pnpm exec tsx --test tools/budget-tracker.test.ts (red/green for concurrency, circuit breakers, weekly report)
pnpm exec tsx --test tools/db-prisma-typecheck.test.ts (red/green for Prisma client typecheck in clean worktree)
summary: Completed P0-7 budget controls: tools/budget-tracker.ts now supports control events for Tier 1/2/3 concurrency, tool_error, file_edit, regulatory_failure, tenancy_failure, hash_chain_divergence and worktree_heartbeat.
Added pnpm budget:control and pnpm budget:weekly; weekly budget reports write to compliance/budget-log/weekly/<iso-week>.md.
Added GitHub workflow .github/workflows/weekly-budget-report.yml to generate weekly reports and open a PR instead of writing compliance/** directly to main.
Fixed fresh-worktree Prisma typecheck by removing the custom Prisma output path and making @afere/db typecheck run prisma generate before tsc; added regression test tools/db-prisma-typecheck.test.ts.
Updated .claude/settings.json caps plus harness/11-budgets.md and harness/STATUS.md; P0-7 is now marked implemented.
limitations: Automatic control-event recording still depends on hooks or CI passing explicit budget:control metadata; the tracker enforces and records when invoked.
Weekly report workflow will only run after GitHub Actions is enabled on the remote and will require product-governance review because it opens PRs against compliance/**.
P0-2 approved baseline/KMS, P0-3 remaining PRD §13 mapping, P0-9 runbooks, P0-10 verification cascade and P0-11 redundancy/loops remain pending.
next_steps: Push main to origin and confirm remote HEAD.

verification: pnpm exec tsx --test packages/normative-rules/src/package.test.ts (RED: missing approved package exports; GREEN: 8/8 pass after implementation and baseline files)
git commit hooks via Git Bash .githooks/pre-commit for both commits
summary: Implemented P0-2 approved package verification: @afere/normative-rules now loads approved package directories with public-key and signature metadata sidecars, parses releases/manifest.yaml, and verifies version/effective_date/hash/key_id against signed package contents.

Published compliance/normative-packages/approved/2026-04-20-baseline-v0.1.0 with package.yaml, SHA-256, Ed25519 signature, public key, signature metadata and CHANGELOG; releases/manifest.yaml indexes the baseline hash b8a3f72a16bb9e7e70f4d52f084b384f830d2af3c0a7ad80f6ef3225d7aaa531.
Added ADR 0004 for normative package governance, SLA, review committee and watchlist; updated harness/04, harness/STATUS and compliance/normative-packages/README.md.
Fixed fresh-worktree Prisma race by making turbo typecheck depend on each package build and adding tools/db-prisma-typecheck.test.ts coverage.
limitations: KMS real signing is still pending and remains the blocker before P0-2 can be marked fully implemented; the v0.1.0 baseline uses an offline bootstrap Ed25519 key with no private key versioned.
The baseline consolidates versioned local repo sources; formal release still requires current official-source review before regulated use.
P0-3 remains partially mapped at 3/22 PRD §13 criteria; P0-9 runbooks, P0-10 cascade and P0-11 redundancy/loops remain pending.
next_steps: Push main to origin and confirm remote HEAD.
Implement KMS-backed signing or ADR-approved exception flow for the next normative package change.

Implement P0-10 verification cascade after the dossier has broader requirement coverage.

summary: Implemented ADR 0005 semantics for validation dossier coverage: PRD §13 criteria can be validated, mapped, or missing.

Mapped all 22 PRD §13 criteria in compliance/validation-dossier/requirements.yaml; 19 product criteria are validation_status planned with planned_tests, while 3 existing gates remain validated by active tests.
Regenerated traceability-matrix.yaml and coverage-report.md so the dossier reports 22/22 mapped and 3/22 validated by active tests.
Added specs/0002-mvp-acceptance-traceability.md and updated harness/STATUS.md for P0-3.
limitations: P0-3 is not complete for release: 19 criteria remain mapped without active validation evidence.
Planned tests are intentional roadmap targets and are not asserted to exist until the corresponding product slice is implemented.
KMS real signing for P0-2, P0-9 runbooks, P0-10 verification cascade and P0-11 redundancy/loops remain pending.
next_steps: Push branch codex/p0-3-dossier-map and open a PR because compliance/** changed.
